name: TC-NT-070
title: 5 yrs FT direct + 5 yrs related-corp = 10 yrs aggregated qualifies for full payout
source: NT LSL Act 1981 s.12(6)/(7); TBD-NT-15 — related-corp service aggregation

expected._reconciliation_note: Related-corp aggregation lifts years_of_continuous_service to 10 → qualifies for full 13-wk payout. valueOfWeek (per-year sum / aggregated payable weeks) is HALVED ($750.15) vs currentWeeklyGross ($1500.00) because per-year buckets cover only the physical 5 yrs but accrual normalises over 10 yrs. Engine arithmetic exact ($9754) but the surfaced per-week figure is counter-intuitive. PM ruling needed.
